DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN F. O'CONNOR, Esq. of Clark Hill LLP (Tel: 415-984-8500) for plaintiff;
Attys. ANN MCFARLAND DRAPER, Esq. of Draper Law Offices (Tel: 415-989-5620) and THOMAS J. LALANNE, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas J. LaLanne (Tel: 415-434-1122) for defendants Ocean Avenue Real Estate Fund, LLC and Tony Garnicki.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC, AND TONY GARNICKI'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

Defendants' demurrer to the second amended complaint ("SAC") is overruled in its entirety.

Defendants' demurrer to the first through fourth causes of action is overruled. "Ordinarily, a general demurrer may not be sustained, nor a motion for judgment on the pleadings granted, as to a portion of a cause of action." (Daniels v. Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc. (2016) 246 Cal.App.4th 1150, 1167.) Defendants' argument as to illegal usurious interest rates does not attack an entire cause of action. "The attempt to exact the usurious rate of interest renders the interest provisions of a note void. The usurious provisions, however, do not affect the right of the payee to recover the principal amount of the note when due." (Epstein v. Frank (1981) 125 Cal.App.3d 111, 122-123.)

Defendants' demurrer to the fifth and sixth causes of action for fraud and negligent misrepresentation is overruled. "Promissory fraud is a subspecies of the action for fraud and deceit. A promise to do something necessarily implies the intention to perform; hence, where a promise is made without such intention, there is an implied misrepresentation of fact that may be actionable fraud." (Behnke v. State Farm General Ins. Co. (2011) 196 Cal.App.4th 1443, 1453.) Defendants' argument that certain of the alleged misrepresentations are "at best opinions and puffing" (MPA at 8:23) is groundless. The fifth and sixth causes of action are both adequately supported by allegations that Defendants did not intend to perform the alleged promises when made. (SAC pars. 80, 86.) In addition, both causes of action sufficiently allege that Defendant Garnicki made the misrepresentations. (Id. pars. 80, 87.)

Defendants to file an answer within 30 days of notice of entry of order.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC AND TONY GARNICKI'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Defendant Ocean Avenue does not provide a meet and confer declaration in compliance with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41(a). The only evidence before the Court indicates that the parties did not meet and confer regarding the Second Amended Complaint. (O'Connor Decl., par. 6.) The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. Ocean Avenue's response to the Second Amended Complaint is now due by July 23, 2021.
